item.title: Why is Crop Life Science Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Crop Life Science Ltd's stock price fell by 3.55% to close at ₹43.50, continuing a downward trend that has seen the share underperform both its sector and the broader market benchmarks over recent periods. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd’s stock price declined by 1.86% to close at ₹3,004, continuing a three-day losing streak despite its robust long-term fundamentals and market-beating returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Vishwas Agri Seeds Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling 10.97% to close at ₹32.05, marking a new 52-week and all-time low. This steep drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s prolonged underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is NRB Bearings Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, NRB Bearings Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.41% to close at ₹250.55. This drop follows two consecutive days of gains and occurs despite the stock outperforming its sector on the day. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Krypton Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Krypton Industries Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, closing at ₹32.00, down ₹2.14 or 6.27% from the previous close. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Central Bank of India falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Central Bank of India’s stock price fell sharply by 4.57% to close at ₹33.59, continuing a trend of underperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Zenith Fibres Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19 Mar, Zenith Fibres Ltd saw its share price rise by 4.02% to close at ₹50.45, marking a notable rebound amid a volatile trading session and outperforming its textile sector peers despite broader market challenges. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is SKP Securities Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, SKP Securities Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹92.70 with a gain of ₹1.50 or 1.64%. This upward movement stands out against a backdrop of sector decline and broader market challenges, reflecting a combination of strong intraday performance and heightened investor participation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Chennai Ferrous Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Chennai Ferrous Industries Ltd recorded a 1.5% rise in its share price to ₹71.80, marking a tentative recovery after a sustained period of decline. Despite this short-term gain, the stock remains under pressure, reflecting broader challenges faced by the company and its sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Gowra Leasing & Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Gowra Leasing & Finance Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, falling by 2.29% to close at ₹85.00. This drop follows two consecutive days of gains and occurs against a backdrop of sector-wide weakness and diminished investor engagement. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Shreyans Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Shreyans Industries Ltd witnessed a significant price rise of 10.0%, closing at ₹154.00, driven by strong short-term gains and notable outperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Eveready Industries India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Eveready Industries India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.31% to close at ₹291.20. This drop reflects a combination of sector-wide pressures and company-specific challenges that have weighed on investor sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Petronet LNG Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Petronet LNG Ltd. experienced a significant decline in its share price, falling by 6.83% to close at ₹271.40. This drop reflects a combination of sector-wide weakness, technical selling pressure, and underperformance relative to key benchmarks and peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is PS IT Infrastructure & Services Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, PS IT Infrastructure & Services Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, continuing a sustained downward trajectory that has significantly underperformed the broader market benchmarks over the past year and beyond. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Artson Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Artson Ltd’s stock price rose by 2.64% to close at ₹143.85, continuing a positive trend that has seen the share gain 11.34% over the past three days despite a declining sector backdrop. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri Ltd (TBZ) witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹130.45, down ₹4.5 or 3.33% from the previous session. This drop comes after two days of consecutive gains and reflects broader sectoral weakness alongside technical pressures on the stock. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Kanco Tea & Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 19-Mar, Kanco Tea & Industries Ltd’s stock price has fallen to ₹58.97, down by 2.88% on the day, continuing a sustained downward trend driven by weak long-term fundamentals and consistent underperformance relative to market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹519.45, down ₹14.20 or 2.66%. This drop continues a recent downward trend amid disappointing quarterly results and valuation pressures, despite the company’s strong long-term growth metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Nidhi Granites Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, Nidhi Granites Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 7.43% to close at ₹255.50. This drop comes despite the company’s strong long-term growth and recent positive financial results, highlighting a complex interplay of valuation pressures and market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is MSP Steel & Power Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 19-Mar, MSP Steel & Power Ltd’s stock price fell by 1.96% to ₹30.00, reflecting a reversal after two days of gains and underperformance relative to broader market trends and sectoral pressures. Time: 1 hour ago
